name: DeSano
teaser: Neapolitan for people who secretly just want a doughier New York pizza. Good place to watch a soccer game.
review: "Neapolitan" for people who secretly just want a doughier New York pizza. I'm not sure they're using the best stuff, but it's still pretty tasty, it's a good place to watch a soccer game, and there's free parking.
headsUp: One of the originals in the LA Neapolitan wave. Still holds up.
update: The OG Neapolitan spot in LA is still putting out good pies.
address: 4959 Santa Monica Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90029, USA
hours: Monday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Tuesday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Wednesday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Thursday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Friday: 11:30 AM – 10:30 PM · Saturday: 11:30 AM – 10:30 PM · Sunday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM
